decks.notes: This deck focuses on controlling the game through the use of Gates to ramp up mana and provide utility. The key strategy involves using gate creatures like Gatecreeper Vine and Guardian of the Guildpact to stall opponents while setting up for powerful spells like Malevolent Rumble and Journey to Nowhere to control the board. The deck also includes cards like Armadillo Cloak and Prismatic Strands to gain life and protect creatures. Overall, this deck aims to outlast opponents while slowly gaining advantage through efficient use of Gates and controlling spells.

This deck focuses on using gates to control the board while generating card advantage through various spells and creatures. The key strategy is to establish a strong defensive position using Guardian of the Guildpact and Journey to Nowhere, while also gaining life and card advantage through Malevolent Rumble and Thraben Charm. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently dealing with threats and gaining incremental advantages through its gate synergy and removal spells. With a mix of defensive creatures and efficient removal, this deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck includes cards that allow the player to consistently draw cards, counter spells played by the opponent, and remove threats from the board. Additionally, the deck includes cards that can generate card advantage and provide additional value in the form of creatures with evasion. The overall goal is to outvalue the opponent while controlling the game until victory.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures and burn spells. Clockwork Percussionist and Goblin Tomb Raider provide early aggression, while Reckless Lackey and Voldaren Epicure help to maintain pressure. Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt offer direct damage to clear the way for attacks. The deck also includes support cards like Gingerbrute and Inventor's Axe for additional damage. With a low mana curve and plenty of burn spells, this Aggro - Red Deck Wins deck aims to quickly defeat the opponent before they can stabilize their defenses.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggression. By combining creatures like Refurbished Familiar and Nyxborn Hydra with removal spells like Cast Down and Eviscerator's Insight, the deck aims to control the board and deal damage efficiently. Additionally, resource generation from cards like Ichor Wellspring and Cleansing Wildfire allow for consistent threats to be played each turn. The inclusion of cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Fanatical Offering also provide disruption and protection for the deck's creatures, ensuring a solid tempo advantage throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while controlling the board with counterspells and removal spells. The deck aims to use cheap spells to fill the graveyard for cards like Cryptic Serpent and Lórien Revealed, which can provide big threats early in the game. The deck also includes card draw and deck manipulation to maintain a consistent game plan. With a low mana curve and a focus on tempo, this Mono Blue Aggro deck looks to close out games quickly and efficiently.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble a combination of cards that allow you to continuously prevent your opponent from attacking while drawing through your deck to find your win condition. By using card draw spells, land bounce effects, and fog effects, you can stall the game long enough to cast a massive Weather the Storm or generate a huge Stream of Thought to secure the victory. This deck aims to control the game through card advantage and prevent your opponent from successfully mounting an offensive.

The concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of low-cost white creatures and pump them up with various white creature-based spells and enchantments. The focus is on building a wide board presence quickly and efficiently, while also utilizing cards like Prismatic Strands and Journey to Nowhere for removal and protection. With a mix of card draw, creature bounce, and token generation, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and keep up the aggression throughout.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly generate card advantage while also maintaining control over the board through counterspells and tempo plays. By leveraging cheap threats like Delver of Secrets and efficient removal spells like Tolarian Terror, the deck aims to pressure the opponent while disrupting their game plan. By utilizing card selection and graveyard synergy, the deck can quickly deploy powerful threats like Cryptic Serpent and Murmuring Mystic to close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent using cheap burn spells and aggressive creatures. By efficiently using mana and cards, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game and finish them off with direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The combination of creatures with burn spells makes it difficult for the opponent to stabilize, allowing for a fast and aggressive win condition. The deck also includes cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery to maintain card advantage and ensure a steady flow of threats.

The main idea behind this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures, using cards like Avenging Hunter and Nyxborn Hydra. The deck also focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Utopia Sprawl and Wild Growth to play powerful threats like Eldrazi Repurposer and Bannerhide Krushok. The inclusion of Ram Through and Vines of Vastwood allows for removal and combat tricks to push through damage. Overall, the strategy revolves around quick board presence and powerful threats to control the game and defeat the opponent.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays with the Jund colors, using cards like Refurbished Familiar and Writhing Chrysalis to quickly generate value and overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing efficient removal spells like Cast Down and Krark-Clan Shaman, as well as resource denial with Cleansing Wildfire and Nihil Spellbomb, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent while maintaining a fast-paced, proactive game plan. With cards like Lembas and Drossforge Bridge providing additional utility and card draw, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure and control the pace of the game in order to secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, along with creatures like Masked Meower and Voldaren Epicure. The deck aims to pressure the opponent with aggressive plays and finish them off with burn spells. The inclusion of cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery provide additional resources and ways to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Snow-Covered Mountain ensures consistent mana production for casting spells.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and removal spells. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building up its own board presence. The deck includes efficient creatures like Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher, alongside removal spells like Cast Down. It also includes lifegain options to help stabilize against aggressive decks. The deck's mana base includes artifact lands like Ancient Den and Vault of Whispers to help cast its spells efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain control of the game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while efficiently drawing and utilizing resources. The deck includes a mix of counterspells, card draw, removal, and finishers like Gurmag Angler and Murmuring Mystic. The key strategy is to control the board with counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures like Contaminated Aquifer and Lórien Revealed, while gradually building card advantage through spells like Brainstorm and Mental Note. The deck aims to out-value and outlast the opponent by efficiently managing resources and denying the opponent's game plan.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using burn spells and aggressive creatures. Guttersnipe and Voldaren Epicure provide additional damage whenever you cast spells, while cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery help you draw more cards and find your key pieces. Sneaky Snacker and Kessig Flamebreather are efficient creatures that can attack and close out the game quickly. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with constant damage and aggression.
